allow: Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -File | ForEach-Object { $content = Get-Content $_.FullName -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($content\) { $updated = $content -replace '\\''__APP_NAME__'\\'', '\\''todo-app'\\'' -replace '\\''__APP_TITLE__'\\'', '\\''TodoApp'\\''; if \($updated -ne $content\) { Set-Content $_.FullName $updated -NoNewline; Write-Host "Updated: $\($_.FullName\)" } } }')
Bash(rm -f Program.cs sample-api.csproj sample-api.http appsettings.json appsettings.Development.json)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); pages=data['items']; last_page=pages[-1]; items=last_page['items'] if 'items' in last_page else []; print\([i['catalogEntry']['version'] for i in items[-5:]]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,v.get\('type',''\),v.get\('compile',{}\).keys\(\)\) for k,v in d.get\('targets',{}\).get\('.NETCoreApp,Version=v9.0',{}\).items\(\) if 'Serilog' in k]")
